title: S.O. 565(E), dated 31.01.2019 - Justice Shri K. Ramakrishnan, former Judge of High Court of Kerala , as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal w.e.f 19th November, 2018

Ramakrishnan, former Judge of High Court of Kerala as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal with effect from the 19th November, 2018 (forenoon) for a period of five years or till he attains the age of sixty-seven years or till further orders, whichever is earlier. [F.No. 17(42)/2016-PL/NGT (Vol.II)] YASHVIR SINGH, Economic Advisor Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
